Streets of Fury

Streets of Fury is a side-scrolling beat 'em up where you fight through waves of enemies across multiple stages. Defeat all enemies to advance through the stage, use combos to maximize your score, and watch out for increasingly dangerous foes. Break objects for health pickups and score bonuses. Defeat the boss at the end to win the game!

Arrow Keys: Move left/right | Space: Attack/Punch (chain for combos) | Z: Special Attack (uses health) | Shift: Grab nearby enemies | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu

Streets of Fury

Streets of Fury is a side-scrolling beat 'em up where you fight through waves of enemies across multiple stages. Defeat all enemies to advance through the stage, use combos to maximize your score, and watch out for increasingly dangerous foes. Break objects for health pickups and score bonuses. Defeat the boss at the end to win the game!

Arrow Keys: Move left/right | Space: Attack/Punch (chain for combos) | Z: Special Attack (uses health) | Shift: Grab nearby enemies | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu
